description.ko: 심해의 미드나잇 존에서 생물 발광의 신비를 탐사하기 위해 극한의 수압을 견디도록 설계된 최첨단 해저 탐사 유닛입니다.
description.en: A high-tech underwater exploration unit designed to withstand extreme pressure while discovering bioluminescent wonders in the midnight zone of the ocean.

prompt: A futuristic, sleek submersible robot named AQUA-5 navigating the pitch-black deep ocean. Bioluminescent flora and fauna glow in neon blues and purples in the background. Bubbles rising, high-tech metallic textures, cinematic lighting, 8k resolution, photorealistic underwater scenery, extreme depth atmosphere.
